hero.title: Together Building The Best.
hero.description: Established in 2005, TEKCOM Corporation specializes in providing plywood and associated products to partners and clients in Vietnam and export markets. With a strong commitment to deliver high-quality products, the challenge of developing innovative solutions for construction and architectural creation never stops.
hero.productsList: Formwork Plywood | Furniture Plywood | RTA Kitchen Cabinets

vision.title: A Market Leader in Wood and Associated Products
vision.lead: To be a market leader of preferred wood and associated products; and to provide innovative solutions in construction and architectural design.
items: Leading position in the national and regional market through innovation and a well-known brand.
Being a sustainable leading manufacturer in the region.
Constantly renewed to bring suitable solutions to customers.

items.title: Constant Renewal
items: Learn to share, share to learn

items.name: Binh Duong 01 Factory
items.desc: TEKCOM's 55,000 square-meter factory is equipped with the most state-of-the-art facilities in FFP industry. Our offerings are certified to conform with EU Standards (EN 13986) and obtain TÜV Rheinland Certification in plywood.

items.name: Binh Duong 02 Factory
items.desc: Opened in 2019, BD2 is more automated and specialized in producing plywood for furniture and other industries, including high-quality kitchen cabinets.

milestones.title: Together Building The Best
milestones.subtitle: In each step of operation, TEKCOM is striving for consistent coordination with our partners.

items.title: First plywood line
items.desc: Launched our first plywood production line at BD1.

items.title: Export markets
items.desc: Began serving partners across Asia, Australia, and the EU.

items.title: BD2 factory
items.desc: Opened the second factory dedicated to furniture plywood.

items.title: RTA Cabinets
items.desc: Launched RTA Kitchen Cabinet line for the US market.

cta.title: Ready to build something together?
cta.desc: Our team is ready to support your next project — from sample requests to long-term supply partnerships.

hero.title: Engineered Wood, Built To Perform.
hero.description: From formwork in skyscrapers to elegant furniture pieces, our plywood products are trusted by architects, contractors and manufacturers across 30+ countries.

items.name: Formwork Plywood
features: Phenolic film face for excellent release

quality.title: International Standards & Certifications
quality.p1: Every product leaving our factories is tested at every stage — from log selection to final inspection — to ensure consistent performance.
quality.p2: We hold EN 13986 (CE), TÜV Rheinland, CARB Phase II, FSC® Chain of Custody and meet the strict E0/E1 emission limits for indoor use.

hero.title: RTA Kitchen Cabinets
hero.description: At TEKCOM, we specialize in manufacturing premium kitchen cabinets in Vietnam. We ensure exceptional craftsmanship and reliable delivery, meeting the high demands of cabinet manufacturing.

items.title: Premium Materials
items.desc: Solid wood, plywood box, soft-close hardware.

hero.title: Trusted in 30+ Countries.
hero.description: From Vietnamese contractors to global furniture brands, TEKCOM serves a diverse customer base on every continent.

items.name: Asia Pacific
items.countries: Vietnam, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Australia, New Zealand

hero.title: News & Updates
hero.description: Latest stories from TEKCOM — product launches, sustainability progress and behind-the-scenes from our factories.

articles.title: TEKCOM Expands Export Footprint to North America
articles.excerpt: We are proud to announce a new long-term supply agreement with a leading US distributor of formwork plywood…

articles.title: Sustainability Report 2025 Released
articles.excerpt: Highlights include a 23% reduction in scope-1 emissions, FSC® certified raw material rate of 88%, and a new solar rooftop…

articles.title: Inside the BD2 Furniture Plywood Line
articles.excerpt: A walkthrough of our most automated line — from log peeling to packaging, here's how a sheet is made.

articles.title: TEKCOM at Vietnam Wood 2025
articles.excerpt: Visit us at booth A-12 to see our newest formwork line and the RTA Cabinet showroom.

hero.title: Build Your Career With Us
hero.description: At TEKCOM, our people are the engine behind every product. Join a team that values excellence, collaboration, and constant renewal.

benefits.title: Benefits & Culture
items: Premium health insurance for employees & family
Modern facilities and a friendly workplace

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Thank you for contacting TEKCOM. How can we help you today? We strive to respond to online inquiries within 72 hours on work days, or on the next work day following a weekend or holiday.

hero.title: Together, For The Long Run.
hero.description: Sustainability is not a side initiative at TEKCOM — it shapes how we source, produce, and partner. Our 2030 roadmap is built around three pillars.

items.title: Sustainable Sourcing
items.desc: 100% legal timber, 88% FSC® certified, partnerships with smallholder forest growers in Vietnam.

items.title: Cleaner Operations
items.desc: Solar rooftop on BD2 covers 22% of factory electricity. Targeting 50% renewable mix by 2030.

items.title: People & Community
items.desc: Safe working conditions, fair wages, and active investment in workforce education and local development.
